content:
A shorts styled breakdown of Arachne. Make sure you're familiar with Ultra <:realm_ultra:1437283545784651926> mechanics, her Singularity changes a lot!  <:Ramona_duel:1356053112292511815> 
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/NQKTMRtx0jE

embeds.title: Arachne: The Trapped Fateweaver #morimens
embeds.description: "The weaver ensnared by her own web; the playwright and eternal spectator of the Theater of Fate. Threads cascade from Arachne’s fingertips, twining into curtains, scripts, and cages. Each strand spun by her own hand, only to shroud her in an inescapable cocoon. The auditorium remains forever vacant
